title: A full account is safe
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for settling into a balance that feels too good to keep.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 36 of the MONEY program. For when a healthy bank balance still feels precarious rather than ordinary.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 36 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you check the account and instead of settling into the number, you start watching it.

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 36 of the MONEY program. The pattern it works with: money arrives, the account fills, and instead of settling into that, the body goes on high alert. This affirmation names the new reality plainly.
A full account is safe. I am safe with a full account. I allow myself to feel completely safe holding and keeping this.
Say it three times in the morning, hand on heart. On the third pass, say it while you look at the actual number in your banking app.
Adapted from Day 36 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
